title: Recipe Book Delight
description: Adds a recipe book to the cooking pot from Farmer's Delight [Fabric].
body:
## Recipe Book Delight [![Follow on Bluesky](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/melontini/mini-badges/v1/social/bluesky/follow.svg)](https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:udgxgv72u6qheiwgwfahqylp) This mod adds a recipe book to the cooking pot from Farmer's Delight.


[](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) ## This mod is required on both client and server!! ## If you are adding this mod to an existing world, it is highly recommended that you revoke all recipes and recipe advancements! No recipes will appear if you don't do this! If anyone asks, yes, this is from [Plus-](https://modrinth.com/modpack/plus-).
